name: light-superpowers
description: A task-scaled alternative to heavy Superpowers workflows.

interface.longDescription: Light Superpowers keeps Codex work disciplined without forcing full brainstorming, planning, TDD, subagents, or branch-completion flows for small tasks.
defaultPrompt: Use $light-superpowers and keep this task lightweight.
Use $light-superpowers: make the smallest safe change and verify it.
Use $light-superpowers instead of the full Superpowers workflow.
